title: digitalis subalpina var. transiens
intro: Digitalis subalpina var. transiens is a plant species that belongs to the foxglove family (Plantaginaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating heart conditions such as atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure, due to its cardiac glycoside content. The health benefits of Digitalis subalpina var. transiens include improved heart function, increased cardiac output, and enhanced overall cardiovascular well-being. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, infusions, and extracts, which are used to support heart health and alleviate symptoms of cardiac conditions.
